languages.text: "Им придется привыкнуть. Мы теперь никуда не денемся. Один шанс служить фон Валанциусам полк на компост пустил, второй раз мы такой ошибки не допустим".
"They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."
languages.original_text: "Им придется привыкнуть. Мы теперь никуда не денемся. Один шанс служить фон Валанциусам полк на компост пустил, второй раз мы такой ошибки не допустим".

traits.locale_text: "They'll have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valancius — we won't make that mistake again."
"They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."
"That is what I wanted to avoid, Lord Captain, and that is why I wasn't burning to re-establish contact with the Imperium."
"They'll have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valancius — we won't make that mistake again."
"They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

languages.text: 「それは私が避けたいことでした、艦長。だから帝国との連絡を再樹すことに熱意がなかったのです」
languages.original_text: "That is what I wanted to avoid, Lord Captain, and that is why I wasn't burning to re-establish contact with the Imperium."

languages.text: "Buna alışmaları gerekecek. Kalıcı olmak için buradayız. Alay von Valanciuslara hizmet etme şansını bir kez zaten heba etti. O hatayı tekrarlamayacağız."
languages.original_text: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

traits.locale_text: "Buna alışmaları gerekecek. Kalıcı olmak için buradayız. Alay von Valanciuslara hizmet etme şansını bir kez zaten heba etti. O hatayı tekrarlamayacağız."

languages.text: “他们只能学着习惯。我们会一直留在这里。这个军团已经浪费了一次为冯·瓦兰修斯家族效力的机会，我们不会再犯同样的错误。”
languages.original_text: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

traits.locale_text: “他们只能学着习惯。我们会一直留在这里。这个军团已经浪费了一次为冯·瓦兰修斯家族效力的机会，我们不会再犯同样的错误。”

languages.text: "Sie müssen sich nur daran gewöhnen. Wir sind hier, um zu bleiben. Das Regiment hat schon einmal die Chance verstreichen lassen, der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu dienen ... diesen Fehler machen wir nicht noch einmal.
languages.original_text: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

traits.locale_text: "Sie müssen sich nur daran gewöhnen. Wir sind hier, um zu bleiben. Das Regiment hat schon einmal die Chance verstreichen lassen, der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu dienen ... diesen Fehler machen wir nicht noch einmal.

languages.text: « Ils n'auront pas le choix. Nous sommes ici pour rester. Le régiment a déjà gâché une chance de servir la famille von Valancius. Nous ne referons pas la même erreur. »
languages.original_text: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

traits.locale_text: « Ils n'auront pas le choix. Nous sommes ici pour rester. Le régiment a déjà gâché une chance de servir la famille von Valancius. Nous ne referons pas la même erreur. »

languages.text: «Tendrán que acostumbrarse a ello. Estamos aquí para quedarnos. El regimiento ya desperdició una oportunidad de servir a los von Valancius; no repetiremos ese error».
languages.original_text: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."

traits.locale_text: «Tendrán que acostumbrarse a ello. Estamos aquí para quedarnos. El regimiento ya desperdició una oportunidad de servir a los von Valancius; no repetiremos ese error».
